title: Generate Hackers 3 poster image
acceptance_criteria: Generates an original image for a fictional Hackers 3 concept without copying real actors or copyrighted characters
Uses a neon cyberpunk visual language with 90s hacker nostalgia and modern cinematic polish
Saves the final PNG to assets/images/hackers-3.png or a suffixed variant if the file already exists
Contains no visible text, logos, captions, or watermarks
Reports the final output path and a short visual description
prompt: Create an original movie-poster style image for a fictional 'Hackers 3'. Use a neon cyberpunk aesthetic with 90s hacker nostalgia and modern cinematic polish. Show a central hacker silhouette, glowing monitors, code reflections, city lights, cables, and a high-energy digital atmosphere. Keep it original and non-identifiable; do not copy real actors or copyrighted characters. No visible text, logos, captions, or watermarks. Save as a PNG.
